info.description: Research and policy reports, grouped anywhere on the site via the `section` field. pathSlug sets the public URL; MDX is always stored flat under src/content/reports/ (or reports/es/).

title.description: Used for the browser tab title and breadcrumb label.

pathSlug.description: Path relative to the chosen Section. For section: foundation, this is the full path from the site root (e.g. policy-and-advocacy/role-stablecoins-...). For summit or hackathon, leave off the summit/ or hackathon/ prefix — it's added automatically based on Section.

section.description: Site section for routing and breadcrumbs. Does not affect MDX file location.

heading.description: The heading shown at the top of the report page. Can differ from the page title.

description.description: Short description used for SEO and card text. Aim for 120–160 characters.

introParagraph.description: Optional intro paragraph shown below the heading and dates.

date.description: Optional. Only add this if you want to show publish/last-updated dates on the page.
